stan-lee.name: Stan Lee
stan-lee.description: Writer, editor, and former editor-in-chief of Marvel Comics. Co-created Spider-Man, the Avengers, the Fantastic Four, the X-Men, and many other iconic characters.

steve-ditko.name: Steve Ditko
steve-ditko.description: Artist and co-creator of Spider-Man and Doctor Strange alongside Stan Lee, known for his distinctive, surreal visual style.

aurelio-galleppini.name: Aurelio Galleppini
aurelio-galleppini.description: Italian penciler known as Galep, he was the first artist of Tex Willer, drawing the character for more than 40 years.

bill-everett.name: Bill Everett
bill-everett.description: Golden Age comic legend who created Namor and co-created Daredevil. He drew for Atlas, Timely, and Marvel Comics.

bill-finger.name: Bill Finger
bill-finger.description: Prolific Golden Age writer, co-creator of Batman and Robin, and of Green Lantern. His name was only legally attached to Batman in 2016.

bob-kane.name: Bob Kane
bob-kane.description: Cartoonist considered the co-creator of Batman alongside Bill Finger. Inducted into both the Jack Kirby Hall of Fame and the Will Eisner Comic Book Hall of Fame.

cory-walker.name: Cory Walker
cory-walker.description: Comic book penciller, co-creator of Invincible alongside Robert Kirkman.

don-heck.name: Don Heck
don-heck.description: Legendary comic book artist who co-created Iron Man, Hawkeye, Black Widow, and Wonder Man.

george-papp.name: George Papp
george-papp.description: Golden Age artist who worked at DC in its early days as National Periodicals. Creator of Green Arrow.

gerry-conway.name: Gerry Conway
gerry-conway.description: American writer known for co-creating the Punisher (with artist Ross Andru) and for scripting the death of Gwen Stacy in The Amazing Spider-Man. Also co-created DC's Firestorm.

gian-luigi-bonelli.name: Gian Luigi Bonelli
gian-luigi-bonelli.description: Italian comic writer, co-creator of Tex Willer and founder of the publisher Sergio Bonelli Editore.

gil-kane.name: Gil Kane
gil-kane.description: Comic book legend who worked through the Gold, Silver, Bronze, Copper, and Modern ages. Creator or co-creator of Hal Jordan, Iron Fist, Atom, Guy Gardner, and Sinestro, among others.

herb-trimpe.name: Herb Trimpe
herb-trimpe.description: Legendary Silver Age artist best known for his 1970s work on The Incredible Hulk. Co-creator of Wolverine.

jack-kirby.name: Jack Kirby
jack-kirby.description: One of comics' most prolific legends, known as "The King." Created and co-created a multitude of Marvel and DC's most popular characters.

joe-simon.name: Joe Simon
joe-simon.description: One of the top creator/writers of his time, who often teamed up with Jack Kirby to form the first creative team recognized as popular with readers.

john-broome.name: John Broome
john-broome.description: Writer whose career spanned the 1940s to the 1970s, establishing superheroes such as the Flash and Green Lantern for DC.

john-romita-sr.name: John Romita Sr.
john-romita-sr.description: One of the legendary "Marvel Bullpen" artists of the Silver Age. Co-creator of Mary Jane Watson, the Punisher, and Wolverine.

larry-lieber.name: Larry Lieber
larry-lieber.description: Brother of Stan Lee and legendary comic book writer and artist, co-creator of Iron Man, Thor, Loki, and Odin, among others.

len-wein.name: Len Wein
len-wein.description: Writer and editor who created Swamp Thing and co-created Wolverine. Served as Editor-in-Chief of DC Comics during Crisis on Infinite Earths and Watchmen.

mort-weisinger.name: Mort Weisinger
mort-weisinger.description: Longtime editor of Superman during the Silver Age, co-creator of Aquaman, Speedy, and Green Arrow.

robert-kirkman.name: Robert Kirkman
robert-kirkman.description: Comic book writer best known for the series Invincible and The Walking Dead, the latter adapted into a successful TV series.

ross-andru.name: Ross Andru
ross-andru.description: Understated creator who worked for DC and Marvel. Co-creator of the Metal Men and the Punisher. Worked as editor, penciler, and inker.

roy-thomas.name: Roy Thomas
roy-thomas.description: Marvel Comics' second Editor-in-Chief and a legendary writer. His creations include Wolverine, Carol Danvers, Ghost Rider, and Iron Fist.

todd-mcfarlane.name: Todd McFarlane
todd-mcfarlane.description: Rose to fame at Marvel before co-founding Image Comics, where he created Spawn. Also founded McFarlane Toys, a highly successful collectibles company.
